tags.name: RDI Core
tags.description:
Data Integration (RDI) endpoints. This surface is independent of the Cloud API and versions through the RDI OpenAPI contract.

RDI Core API version: 1.18.1

get.description: Returns the current data integration workspace state for the specified subscription.

409.description: Resource conflict or invalid state transition
